behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names bench_util/, tests/bench_util/, docs/tsgo.md, cli/tsc/README.md, tools/lint.js, the 'Typescript-Go Integration' section, cargo check -p deno_bench_util, and the directories cli/tests/tools.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to move and what behavior to achieve without dictating specific code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral outcomes (cargo check passes, file existence, lint detects directories) rather than specific implementation details; the lint tests reimplement the logic independently.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute cargo check subprocesses and run node scripts to verify lint.js behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual cargo compilation and actual directory moves; stubs wouldn't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three requirements (move bench_util, move tsgo.md, update lint.js) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates/pass_to_pass, Fail-to-pass/pr_diff) and annotated with tags.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names tools/lint.js as the file to fix, but localization is not part of the task — the problem is explicitly about that script.
